description: Hi! My name is Patryk and I've been working in data science industry since 2018. I have background in the field of renewable energy, as well as physics of heat-flow processes and their mathematical modeling. I encourage you to read about my side projects, which are described in the Projects section and to check information in the CV section.
contact:
I am open for new opportunities.
If you have one for me - let's talk about it.
